'''Gee Long''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Alien/Legends|alien]] from the [[Umboo]] province on [[Roon/Legends|Roon]]. Gee was friends with [[Auren Yomm Baobab|Auren Yomm]] a champion of the [[Roon Colonial Games]]. Long was a competitor as well and [[Umboo Racing Team|rode alongside]] a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] named [[BIX]] and was lead by Yomm. During the games one year, Long was poisoned and Bix sabotaged by [[Bisad Koong|the competition]]. Luckily, Auren had friends that were able to fill in, a trader named [[Mungo Baobab]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. They won.

==Behind the scenes==
Gee Long was [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] or [[Near-Human]] with pointy ears. [[Leland Chee]], on the [[StarWars.com Message Boards|Star Wars Message Boards]], stated that his theory is that "all pointy-eared species are either [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] or closely related to Sephi."<ref name="TT">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1395#16675997|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2007-06-08|time=6:48 AM|quote=For the longest time we've used dozens of pointy-eared characters without a species name for them. The pointed-eared species in the Jedi: Yoda comic were named Sephi. My theory is that all pointy-eared species are either Sephi or closely related to Sephi.}}</ref>
